description: Check LOO-CV reliability via Pareto-k diagnostics across saved PyMC/ArviZ InferenceData .nc files — counts points above the threshold and reports the maximum k per model.
rules: read-only — never mutates inputs or any remote/live service
each input is a netCDF InferenceData file written with a log_likelihood group
MODELS_DIR globs *.nc (model name = filename stem); MODELS overrides with a comma list of name=path or path
THRESHOLD sets the Pareto-k flag cutoff (default 0.7)
requires arviz (+ pymc) importable for real output; absent libs produce a graceful {} stub
per-model Pareto-k summary written to record_store as loo_reliability.json
usage: Set MODELS_DIR (a dir of .nc files) or MODELS (comma list of name=path.nc). Optional THRESHOLD (default 0.7). Output: loo_reliability.json.
limitation: Read-only diagnostic. Models must have been fit with log_likelihood. Needs arviz/pymc + the netCDF backend; offline it writes an empty JSON stub. High Pareto-k means prefer WAIC or k-fold CV.
